plugin_desc: DEVA Broadcast receiver SNMP collection for devices under DEVA PEN 35833. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current MIB facts expose broadcast receiver alarms and RF/audio service indicators, but do not prove stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power health scalars, so those business indicators are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
